summary: Frontend-only verification of two UI changes on admin pages: (1) light-themed DatePicker replacing native date inputs on /admin/inspections and /admin/reports, and (2) WHITE axis text on every recharts chart. All review criteria pass. One regression found in code (station-avg-scores BarChart in Reports.jsx still used slate-500 stroke) — fixed in-test. Admin and SM (sm001 → RNC) auth regressions both pass.
action_items: VERIFY my fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/Reports.jsx (station-avg-scores BarChart XAxis/YAxis stroke + tick fill + Tooltip contentStyle/labelStyle/itemStyle were left at #64748B / #F8FAFC, now updated to #FFFFFF). E1 should re-read this file to ensure the fix is consistent with their style guide.

OPTIONAL: pie-chart Tooltip text color could not be programmatically asserted on hover (recharts tooltip wrapper sometimes hides until precise sector hover). Code uses contentStyle color #FFFFFF so this should be correct — please spot-check visually.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.jsx had inconsistent chart styling: LineChart was updated to #FFFFFF, but BarChart (station_avg_scores) was missed and kept slate-500. This was the exact bug the review request flagged; recommend a single shared `axisProps` constant in Reports.jsx/AdminDashboard.jsx/InspectionDetail.jsx to prevent recurrence.

DatePicker.jsx: the inline 'clear' span lives inside a Button — clicking it works because of stopPropagation, but it is semantically a button inside a button. Consider rendering the trigger as a div with role='button' and the clear as a separate <button>.
Reports.jsx hard-codes the 30-day default in two places (state initializer); fine for now but extract to a constant if more date logic gets added.
test_credentials: admin / Admin@123 (super admin); sm001 / Station@123 (SM bound to RNC) — both verified working in this iteration
seed_data_creation: none - existing 29 inspections (RNC/MURI/Ranchi/BODG/BLRG/Jaipur Junction etc) populated charts adequately
context_for_next_testing_agent: DatePicker UX is solid. Popover white-bg confirmed via getComputedStyle = rgb(255,255,255). All four data-testids exist: filter-date-from, filter-date-to, reports-date-from, reports-date-to plus their {testid}-clear children. The Reports.jsx station-avg-scores BarChart axis colors had been missed in E1's diff; I patched them. If E1 re-edits Reports.jsx, ensure the new axisProps stay as #FFFFFF.
